hooks.command: if python3 -c "import os,json,sys; cmd=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT') or '{}').get('command',''); sys.exit(0 if 'git commit' in cmd else 1)"; then cargo fmt; fi
if python3 -c "import os,json,sys; cmd=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT') or '{}').get('command',''); sys.exit(0 if 'git commit' in cmd else 1)"; then cargo clippy -- -D warnings; fi
if python3 -c "import os,json,sys; cmd=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT') or '{}').get('command',''); sys.exit(0 if 'git commit' in cmd else 1)"; then cargo test; fi
